arts.sum: The 25-year-old has a long history of injuries which complicates the chances of him signing a new deal at Barca. But United have now entered the race themselves as they also plan to sign a centre back for new manager Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Speculation grows: €50m Manchester United star adds another transfer suitor to the list
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho is reportedly being eyed up by Napoli as a possible replacement for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. The Argentina international has long looked like an exciting young prospect at Man Utd, but his recent performances have been a little below expectations, and it’s not clear if he has a long-term future at the […] The post Speculation grows: €50m Manchester United star adds another transfer suitor to the list appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why are Arsenal wearing an all-white kit at home against Manchester United in the FA Cup?
arts.sum: For the fourth year in a row, Arsenal will wear an-all white kit as part of a campaign aimed at reducing knife crime on the streets of London. It was the murder of 16-year-old Arsenal fan Ben Kinsella in 2008 that led to the creation of an anti- knife crime charity in his memory, which now partners with the club; 10 teenage deaths occurred in 2023 with 9 of them stabbings.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright makes Arsenal January transfer window demand amid worrying admission
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side are six points adrift of Premier League leaders Liverpool and are 2-0 down after the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final against Newcastle United. "You look at this season with the extra Carabao Cup games and Champions League games, there has been injuries in the squad.

arts.ttl: 6 Premier League clubs at risk of being charged THIS WEEK including Man Utd
arts.sum: Six teams were required to submit their accounts by December 31st after being deemed at risk of breaching the Premier League's profit and sustainability rules for the 2021-24 period
